help.title: HOW TO PLAY
help.intro: ChipTap is a provably-fair on-chain battle game. You own NFT chips and stake SOL; every winner is picked by a verifiable Switchboard VRF — not by us.
help.introDevnet: You're on {{cluster}} — play money, no real value.
help.step1Body: Top-right SELECT WALLET button. Phantom, Solflare, or Backpack all work.
help.step2Body: You need a little SOL for fees + stakes. Grab some free from {{faucet}} — paste your wallet address, request ~1 SOL.
help.step3Body: Go to the MINT tab. A chip is your NFT fighter — cheapest is ~{{price}} SOL. You need at least one to enter any game.
help.step4Body: Stakes come from an internal balance inside the game (not your wallet directly). On the BATTLE tab use the INTERNAL BALANCE banner to DEPOSIT some SOL. It's on-chain and yours — WITHDRAW any time. Joining a game auto-tops-up if you're short, so this step is optional.
help.step5Battle: BATTLE — 1v1. Stake {{tier}}+. Loser either pays the pool (95% to winner) to keep their chip, or forfeits the chip.
help.step5Royale: ROYALE — up to 8 players, one VRF roll picks the winner who takes the whole pool. Chips are just your ticket in — they always come back.
help.step5Tourney: TOURNEY — buy a ticket ({{ticket}} SOL), enter an 8-player bracket. Prizes: 1st {{p1}}% / 2nd {{p2}}% / 3rd {{p3}}% of the pool ({{fee}}% fee).
help.step6Body: Won? Your winnings land in your internal balance — hit CLAIM on the result screen, then WITHDRAW on the BATTLE tab to move SOL back to your wallet. Always reclaim your chip too.
help.fairBody: Every result opens an ON-CHAIN AUDIT TRAIL panel with the VRF seed and a Switchboard randomness account you can verify on solscan. The project can't pick winners — the oracle network signs the randomness and the program checks the proof before using it.

boot.noWallet: No wallet detected. Install Phantom (https://phantom.app) or Solflare.

mint.title: CHIP MINT STATION
mint.footnote: Each mint creates a fresh Metaplex Core Asset + ChipData PDA.

lobby.title: > BATTLE LOBBY
lobby.noOpen: No open battles. Be the first!

create.title: > CREATE NEW BATTLE
create.loseHint: If you lose: pay {{pool}} to keep chip, or forfeit chip
